description: Sector overlay for exploration, mining, mineral development, quarrying, extractive transparency, impact assessment, environmental, and project documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for Mining. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Extractive Sector Transparency Measures Act program
Impact Assessment Act
primary_sources.issuer: Justice Canada / Impact Assessment Agency of Canada

rules.title: Mineral title, permit, lease, or project authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for mineral title, mining lease, exploration permit, project authorization, or provincial/territorial authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Provincial/territorial mineral title frameworks; legal review required

rules.title: Extractive payment transparency evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ESTMA reporting, payment categories, reportable payments, or extractive transparency evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Impact assessment or project-description evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Impact Assessment Act, designated project, project description, environmental assessment, or mitigation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Impact Assessment Act and IAAC project-description guidance

rules.title: Indigenous engagement or consultation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Indigenous consultation, engagement, rights, duty to consult, impact benefit agreement, or community engagement evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Canadian constitutional/project review practice; legal review required
